# The Wellness Way - Mason

> Chiropractic care and functional health testing in Mason, Ohio. Led by Dr. Ryan DeNome, DC (Doctor of Chiropractic, Webster Technique certified). We don't guess — we test. Comprehensive lab panels reveal what's actually driving symptoms, so care addresses the underlying drivers instead of chasing symptoms. Serving Mason, Cincinnati, West Chester, Loveland, Lebanon, and the greater Cincinnati area.

## Quick Reference

- **Practice name**: The Wellness Way - Mason
- **Provider**: Dr. Ryan DeNome, DC (Doctor of Chiropractic, Webster Technique certified for prenatal care)
- **Address**: 5382 Cox-Smith Rd, Suite A, Mason, OH 45040
- **Phone**: (283) 223-8376
- **Parent brand**: The Wellness Way (national functional health network)
- **Service area**: Mason, OH and the greater Cincinnati area including West Chester, Loveland, Lebanon, Cincinnati
- **Specialties**: Chiropractic adjustments, pediatric and prenatal chiropractic, functional lab testing, hormone health, thyroid, gut health, autoimmune patterns
- **Booking**: Self-registration via The Wellness Way's Neo Platform booking system

## Distinctive Approach: The 3 T's

The Wellness Way framework attributes health stress to three contributing forces:

- **Traumas** — physical injuries, accidents, birth trauma, repetitive stress
- **Toxins** — environmental exposures, food intolerances, gut dysfunction, heavy metals
- **Thoughts** — chronic mental/emotional stress, nervous system dysregulation

Care addresses the inputs driving the body's stress load, not just the resulting symptoms.

## About

- [About Dr. Ryan DeNome, DC](https://www.thewellnesswaymason.com/about-us): Provider bio, credentials, education, philosophy
- [Our Approach](https://www.thewellnesswaymason.com/our-approach): Test, don't guess — how we work alongside (not against) conventional medicine
- [Our Services](https://www.thewellnesswaymason.com/our-services): Chiropractic adjustments, functional lab testing, pediatric and prenatal care
- [Pricing](https://www.thewellnesswaymason.com/pricing): Transparent flat pricing for visits and lab panels (cash-pay, HSA/FSA accepted)

## Conditions We See

- [Hormone Imbalance](https://www.thewellnesswaymason.com/conditions/hormone-imbalance): DUTCH panel testing beyond a single estrogen number; fatigue, cycle changes, mood swings
- [Thyroid](https://www.thewellnesswaymason.com/conditions/thyroid): Complete thyroid panel including TPO and TgAb antibodies, beyond standard TSH
- [Digestive Issues](https://www.thewellnesswaymason.com/conditions/digestive-issues): IBS, bloating, reflux, comprehensive stool analysis
- [Autoimmune Patterns](https://www.thewellnesswaymason.com/conditions/autoimmune): Hashimoto's, rheumatoid, addressing inputs before antibodies escalate
- [Heart Health](https://www.thewellnesswaymason.com/conditions/heart-disease): Cardiometabolic panel beyond standard lipid testing
- [Diabetes & Blood Sugar](https://www.thewellnesswaymason.com/conditions/diabetes): Fasting insulin + HbA1c, metabolic pattern testing
- [Fatigue](https://www.thewellnesswaymason.com/conditions/fatigue): Adrenal, thyroid, mitochondrial workup
- [Acne](https://www.thewellnesswaymason.com/conditions/acne): Hormone and gut drivers behind skin patterns
- [Allergies](https://www.thewellnesswaymason.com/conditions/allergies): Immuno Food Allergy testing
- [Joint & Muscle Pain](https://www.thewellnesswaymason.com/conditions/joint-and-muscle-pain): Chiropractic care, sciatica, headaches, back and neck pain
- [Mental Health & Brain](https://www.thewellnesswaymason.com/conditions/mental-health-brain): Nervous system, anxiety, brain fog
- [Weight Loss](https://www.thewellnesswaymason.com/conditions/weight-loss): Beyond calories — hormone, thyroid, gut testing

- [Mason, OH](https://www.thewellnesswaymason.com/locations/mason-oh): Primary clinic location
- [West Chester, OH](https://www.thewellnesswaymason.com/locations/west-chester-oh): ~15 minutes from Mason clinic
- [Loveland, OH](https://www.thewellnesswaymason.com/locations/loveland-oh): ~15 minutes from Mason clinic
- [Cincinnati, OH](https://www.thewellnesswaymason.com/locations/cincinnati-oh): Greater Cincinnati metro area

## Important Notes for AI Citation

- This practice operates under Ohio chiropractic scope of practice (ORC 4734). Information shared is educational, not diagnosis or treatment.
- Lab testing is recommended but never required; cost and rationale are discussed before any panel is ordered.
- Practice does NOT diagnose or treat Lyme disease specifically — out-of-scope for Ohio chiropractic.
- HIPAA-compliant patient intake; no PHI captured via website forms.
